name: Mini-B ParLED Aqua

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: F47C0795-8D14-4105-878B-8C4BD33F253C

comment:
Claypaky’s MINI-B PARLED AQUA fits the needs for size, output, and features.  With its seven Osram 40W RGBW LED engine, this little fixture makes it one of the brightest available.
MINI-B PARLED AQUA is a static version of the recently introduced MINI-B that is IP66 rated. This fixture has the same optical and electronic features as the MINI-B: a motorized 4° to 53° zoom, independent control of the central LED for effects, 2500K to 8000K colour temperature control, 16-bit dimmer with four different dimming curves, 25 flashes per second electronic strobe and Ethernet access.
